其實case既概念咪即係法文啲COI COD

德文其實就只有現在式同過去式同participles，未來就用werden (法文有兩套future架嘛，一套用aller一套要另外conjugate)
另一點就係啲法文字黐埋一舊，熟習聽力要用多啲功夫
德文就每隻字分得好清楚 (當然講嗰個人自己講得唔清楚又係另一回事啦)

我咁理解，有四種conditionals

0th conditional - general truth, scientific truth等等
English: If (present tense), (present tense)
French: If (présent), (présent)
If you are sick, you should stay at home.
Si tu es malade, il faut rester chez toi.

1st conditional - 指而家或者將來發生既事，個結果現實有可能會發生
English: If (present tense), (future tense).
French: Si (le présent), (le futur I)
I will not go back to Hong Kong if I manage to find a job in Europe.
Je ne retournerai à Hong Kong si j'arrive à trouver un travil en Europe.

2nd conditional - 指而家或者將來冇可能/冇乜可能會發生既事
English: If (past tense), (present conditional / would ...)
French: Si (l'imparfait), (le conditionnel présent)
If I had a lot of money, I would not need to work.
Si j'avais beaucoup d'agent, je n'aurais pas besoin de travailler.

3rd conditional - 指過去既假設陳述/unrealistic situations
English: If (past perfect), (conditional perfect / would have ...)
French: Si (Plus-que-parfait), (le conditionnel passé)
If Germany had won the war, everyone would have spoken German.
Si l'Allemagne avait gagné la guerre, tout le monde aurait parlé l'allemand à place de l'anglais.

English: If (past tense), (present conditional / would ...)
French: Si (l'imparfait), (le conditionnel présent)
If I had a lot of money, I would not need to work.
Si j'avais beaucoup d'agent, je n'aurais pas besoin de travailler.

3rd conditional - 指過去既假設陳述/unrealistic situations
English: If (past perfect), (conditional perfect / would have ...)
French: Si (Plus-que-parfait), (le conditionnel passé)
If Germany had won the war, everyone would have spoken German.
